plan.description: 3D Fourier spectral method with explicit RK4 time stepping and periodic BCs
plan._llm_score_rationale: Fourier spectral method is ideal for periodic, smooth plane wave solutions, offering spectral accuracy and efficiency. Explicit RK4 is stable at this resolution, and dealiasing is included.

plan.description: 3D Fourier spectral method with IMEX Runge-Kutta time stepping for stiff terms
plan._llm_score_rationale: High-resolution Fourier spectral with IMEX RK is highly accurate and robust, especially for stiff or mixed problems. Computational cost is very high, but justified for maximal accuracy.

plan.description: 3D finite element method with high order Nedelec elements and implicit BDF2 time stepping
plan._llm_score_rationale: High-order Nedelec FEM with implicit BDF2 and enforced divergence-free constraint is highly accurate and robust for Maxwell's equations, though computational cost is significant. Excellent for accuracy and stability.

plan.description: 3D finite difference implicit Crank-Nicolson medium resolution with divergence cleaning
plan._llm_score_rationale: Medium resolution with staggered grid and divergence cleaning improves stability and accuracy. Crank-Nicolson is robust, but memory usage is high and spatial order is only moderate.
